cuts.reason: Dawn-corral under vo-hook-C (compressed 12s intro). Word-level captions begin here — every word renders via <KineticCaptions>.
Story arc opens on cattle-grazing-wide. 'Beef is at record highs.' Word-level captions active.
C-only b-roll: windy-paddock under '65-yr cow herd low'. Wind = volatility = market context. Differentiates from A/B's static fence/storm cuts.
'Labor · gone. Ranchers · aging out.' Empty meadow holds the absence beat. Same asset as A — variant b-roll budget reused efficiently.
C-ONLY: Lightning-silhouette under 'Hail doesn't wait for the next vet visit.' Adds the dramatic stake top-3 list slot #10 called for. Word-level captions get to render in dramatic light.
Drone aerial under '72 hours blind' line. Scale + isolation = the actual editorial hook of variant C.
Hold the 'rancher does not. So we built one.' beat over a return-to-cattle shot. Bookends the story act. Hard cut into demo at 1:10.

Synthesis beat: 30× ambient dashboard with three callout cards stacking right. vo-synthesis-C: 'Five agents. Idle until a sensor wakes them. Skills loaded per-task. Cost ticker freezes between events.' Tight 15s — Elisa stats-barrage backing.

Hard cut to terminal: skyherd-attest verify scrolling 360 entries, Ed25519 sigs blink green. vo-depth-C: tests/coverage/seed/bytes counter. Replaces A/B's 14s substance VO with a richer, terminal-led 15s.

C-ONLY b-roll inset: hardware circuit-board on a small picture-in-picture in lower-right during depth narration — ties Year-2 hardware fleet visually without forcing it into the main shot. Layer: overlay (PiP).
C-ONLY: Microcircuit PiP follows circuit-board, same lower-right slot. Together they assert 'this is real hardware territory' in 15s without leaving the depth narrative.
C-ONLY: Night-sky-stars carries the 'Now — finally — the ranch can watch itself' bookend. Differentiates from A/B's drone-rangeland close. Stars = always-on, the metaphor lands.
